words.def: (used especially of persons) having lived for a relatively long time or attained a specific age
words.zh: a. 最舊的；最老的（old的最高階）

words.def: the federal department responsible for maintaining a national energy policy of the United States; created in 1977
words.zh: v. 做；工作；有用（do的第三人稱單數形式）

words.def: past times (especially in the phrase `in days of old')
(often followed by `of') a large number or amount or extent
words.zh: n. 運氣, 籤, 抽籤, 份額, 許多, 一堆

words.def: a brutal terrorist group active in Kashmir; fights against India with the goal of restoring Islamic rule of India
words.zh: vt. 讓, 假設, 出租, 排放, 妨礙
